landing.heroSubtitle: Already powering 1,000+ AI-optimized resumes. Track jobs, refine resumes, and rehearse interviews — all your job search tools in one place. Built for Taiwan's job market.
landing.heroNote: Free plan forever. No credit card required.
landing.howItWorksTitle: Three steps to launch your AI-powered job search
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: From parsing the JD to rehearsing the interview, every step is accelerated by AI
landing.step1Title: Paste the JD, AI parses it
landing.step1Desc: Drop a job description from sites like LinkedIn — AI auto-extracts the company, salary range, and keywords.
landing.step2Desc: Cross-reference your resume against the JD, surface missing keywords with concrete edits, get an ATS score, and one-click generate a tailored cover letter.
landing.step3Desc: Pick a persona and question type, answer with voice or text. AI scores relevance, logic, and confidence — and rewrites your answer in golden form.
landing.showcaseTitle: The first AI interview coach that actually listens to you speak
landing.showcaseSubtitle: Not a generic Q&A bank — a back-and-forth rehearsal grounded in your real target role.
landing.showcaseBullet1Desc: Speak naturally; AI transcribes and grades your delivery
landing.showcaseBullet2Desc: Strong answers trigger deeper questions to simulate pressure
landing.showcaseBullet3Desc: Relevance, logic, confidence, and overall — every answer measured
landing.showcaseBullet4Desc: Friendly HR, strict tech lead, business-minded CEO
landing.showcaseBullet5Desc: Every session is tracked — proof you're getting better
landing.showcaseChatAi1: Describe the most technically challenging project you've owned.
landing.showcaseChatUser: I led a 5-person team to refactor our core API…
landing.showcaseChatAi2: Walk me through one specific tech decision and your reasoning.
landing.analyticsTitle: See the conversion story behind every application
landing.analyticsSubtitle: Not just tracking — diagnostics. Pro unlocks the full funnel and 12-week activity timeline.
landing.useCasesTitle: Three typical scenarios — see how Offery helps
landing.useCasesSubtitle: Hypothetical use cases to help you decide whether Offery fits your situation.
landing.useCase1Problem: Jumping from a startup to a big company — but unsure how to write a resume that survives ATS screening.
landing.useCase1Solution: Paste the target JD; AI surfaces missing keywords with concrete fixes and an ATS score. Mock interview with a strict tech-lead persona until the stuck answers loosen up.
landing.useCase2Problem: Applying to 20+ roles in parallel; can't remember which interview asked what, restart prep every time.
landing.useCase2Solution: Kanban board centralizes progress; AI generates a tailored cover letter per role; session history + radar chart show progress across each rehearsal.
landing.useCase3Problem: No real interview experience yet — went blank in the first one, can't apply STAR under pressure.
landing.useCase3Solution: Practice 5 behavioral questions with the friendly HR persona. AI offers STAR prompts and golden-answer rewrites until answering becomes muscle memory.
landing.faqSubtitle: The questions we hear most often
landing.faq1Q: How is this different from just using ChatGPT to write my resume?
landing.faq1A: Offery isn't just "chat AI" — it integrates JD parsing, resume comparison, ATS scoring, and mock interviews into a single workflow. Every resume and interview session is stored in a structured way, so the AI keeps referencing your real background instead of you re-explaining yourself every time.
landing.faq2Q: Will my personal data and resumes be used to train AI?
landing.faq2A: No. Your resumes and interview records are stored in Supabase (protected by Row-Level Security) and only your account can access them. Calls to Gemini don't opt in to training data, and all API requests use encrypted channels.
landing.faq3A: Free forever, no credit card required. The Free plan includes unlimited job tracking, up to 3 resumes, and basic analytics. AI resume optimization, cover letter generation, and mock interviews are Pro-only.
landing.faq4Q: Will my data be deleted if I cancel my subscription?
landing.faq4A: No. After cancellation your Pro features will automatically drop to Free at the end of the billing period, but all your historical data (jobs, resumes, interview records) is preserved. Upgrading again resumes everything. To permanently delete, use the Danger Zone in Settings.
landing.faq5Q: Which countries / languages do you support?
landing.faq5A: The interface supports Traditional Chinese (default) and English. The AI output language is configurable independently. The product is optimized for Taiwan's job market (salary norms, ATS templates, local job sites), but overseas roles work too.
landing.faq6A: We don't offer prorated refunds for Pro, but you can cancel any time and continue to use Pro until the period ends. We recommend trying the Free plan before deciding to upgrade.
landing.featuresTitle: All Job Search Tools in One Platform
landing.featuresSubtitle: Stop switching between tools. Offery integrates everything you need for your job search.
landing.feature1Desc: Smart analysis of job descriptions to generate keyword-optimized resumes that pass ATS screening. Supports multiple resume versions.
landing.feature2Desc: Kanban-style interface to manage all applications. From saved to applied, interview to offer — track every job at a glance.
landing.feature3Desc: Auto-generate customized cover letters based on job descriptions and your resume. Tailored for each position.
landing.feature4Desc: Smart comparison between your resume and job descriptions. Identify missing keywords and get actionable optimization suggestions.
landing.feature5Desc: Visualize your job search data. Application conversion rates, interview success rates, salary analysis — data-driven strategy.
landing.feature6Desc: Practice with text or voice. AI scores your relevance, logic, and confidence — with golden-answer rewrites and a radar chart that tracks your progress.
landing.pricingSubtitle: The free plan is already powerful. Upgrade to Pro for full AI capabilities.
landing.freeDesc: For those just starting their job search
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to Start Your Job Search Journey?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Already powering 1,000+ AI-optimized resumes. You're next.

Gathering common pitfalls to watch for…
